heading: Sale of reserved mineral interests; disposition of proceeds
label: 1037 Sale of reserved mineral interests; disposition of proceeds
text: All proceeds from sales made under sections 1033 to 1039 of this title of mineral interests described in shall be covered into the Treasury of the United States as miscellaneous receipts, except that the proceeds from sales of mineral interests which were a part of or derived from the assets transferred pursuant to the transfer agreements with State rural rehabilitation corporations shall be credited to the appropriate corporation account.section 1033 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Bankhead-Jones Farm Tenant Act which constitutes a major part of this chapter.
